flowing.do: Say yes to the thing that scares you a little — momentum is on your side today.
flowing.avoid: Don't dilute a clear impulse by asking too many people what they think.
flowing.why: With energy moving freely, the cost of action is low and confidence compounds quickly.

intense.do: Pour the heat into one decisive move you've been circling for weeks.
intense.avoid: Avoid picking a fight just to discharge the charge you're carrying.
intense.why: High-intensity days reward focus and punish scatter — channel, don't spray.

quiet.do: Rest on purpose and let an honest question about yourself sit unanswered for a day.
quiet.avoid: Don't mistake stillness for stagnation and force a breakthrough that isn't due yet.
quiet.why: The quieter field is for integration, not output — pushing now just tires the engine.

volatile.do: Keep your plans loose and your values fixed; decide what you won't compromise.
volatile.avoid: Avoid signing, sending, or committing to anything you can't easily undo.
volatile.why: When the ground shifts, the win is staying recognizable to yourself, not being right.

flowing.do: Reach out first — warmth lands easily today and small gestures travel far.
flowing.avoid: Don't overthink the wording; sincerity reads louder than polish.
flowing.why: Relational energy is open, so connection costs little and means a lot.

intense.do: Have the real conversation you've been rehearsing, and lead with what you feel, not who's wrong.
intense.avoid: Avoid using intensity as proof of love — heat and care aren't the same thing.
intense.why: Strong currents can deepen a bond or scorch it; intention decides which.

quiet.do: Offer quiet presence — sit with someone without trying to fix anything.
quiet.avoid: Don't read silence as distance; not every gap needs to be closed today.
quiet.why: Tender, low-key days build the trust that dramatic ones can't.

volatile.do: Name your own state out loud before reacting to anyone else's.
volatile.avoid: Avoid making permanent relationship decisions on a turbulent day.
volatile.why: Volatility distorts signal; what feels final today often reads differently tomorrow.

flowing.do: Ship the thing — clear the task that unlocks three others downstream.
flowing.avoid: Don't open new fronts when finishing one would change more.
flowing.why: Smooth conditions favor completion; capitalize before the window narrows.

intense.do: Block the world out and give your hardest problem ninety uninterrupted minutes.
intense.avoid: Avoid back-to-back meetings that scatter a rare burst of deep focus.
intense.why: Intense energy is your sharpest tool — aim it at depth, not busywork.

quiet.do: Tidy the system: notes, backlog, and the small debts that slow everything down.
quiet.avoid: Don't force a creative leap; maintenance is the honest work of a low day.
quiet.why: Quiet stretches are for sharpening the saw so the next push cuts cleaner.

volatile.do: Protect what's already committed and document decisions as you make them.
volatile.avoid: Avoid betting the quarter on a plan formed in a single unstable afternoon.
volatile.why: When variables swing, resilience beats ambition — keep optionality alive.

flowing.do: Follow the curiosity that keeps tugging — learn out loud and let one idea lead to the next.
flowing.avoid: Don't bury a good insight under ten more tabs.
flowing.why: Mental energy is fluid; connection between ideas comes almost for free today.

intense.do: Write the hard thought down in full — the one you keep half-thinking.
intense.avoid: Avoid doom-looping on a worry; intensity makes small fears feel enormous.
intense.why: A focused mind can either solve or spiral — direction is everything.

quiet.do: Let your attention wander without a goal; the best ideas arrive sideways.
quiet.avoid: Don't demand productivity from a mind that's asking to rest.
quiet.why: Diffuse, unforced thinking is where real synthesis happens.

volatile.do: Slow your inputs — one source at a time, and verify before you react.
volatile.avoid: Avoid forwarding, posting, or concluding on incomplete information.
volatile.why: In noisy conditions, the disciplined mind wins by refusing the first story.
